claims.summary: Density components and texture descriptors must remain linked without flattening either representation.
claims.disposition: verify canonical shared DTOs, bridge compatibility projection, and texture-integrity evidence

claims.summary: Mode packing and pressure-source family should be testable for mapping disagreement.
claims.disposition: verify pressure-source analysis and typed consistency tests preserve quantitative and qualitative fields

claims.summary: Pressure-gradient history is needed to distinguish healing, deepening, and static deformation.
claims.disposition: verify bounded bridge-owned history, fast/slow smoothing, gradient trend, and persistent-deformation review already provide this without changing producer DTOs
